title: 2 Bunches Pink Artificial Silk Flowers, Artificial Faux Peonies Hydrangea Flowers Bouquets for Home Wedding Party Centerpiece Decor DIY

High-quality materials: Crafted from high-grade, supple silk, these artificial peony bouquets feature naturally gradient-coloured blooms that resist fading and offer enduring durability. Flexible wire stems facilitate shaping and trimming, while lifelike stamens and lush foliage perfectly replicate the texture of real flowers, making them ideal for diverse floral arrangements.

Save Time and Effort: Faux flowers Unlike fresh flowers, artificial flowers blooms require no watering, pruning or replacement. For those of us lacking time, gardening experience or suffering from pollen allergies, artificial peony bouquets present an excellent alternative. Should dust or other marks appear, simply remove them with a low-heat hairdryer or wipe gently with a soft cloth or sponge.

Multi-purpose 2-bouquet set:Artificial Flowers Ideal for wedding bouquet, garden decorations, home decor, table centrepiece, offices, living spaces, cake flowers，event props, They are also great for flower arrangements and bouquet DIY, combining them with fresh or other artificial flowers to create a personalized bouquet that is a one-of-a-kind gift for family or friends

Care Instructions: Should any flattening occur during transit, simply adjust gently to restore shape. Lightly reshape the stems by hand to revive fullness, and the artificial flowers will swiftly regain their lush form and vibrant hues.
